case_title: RUOFAN WANG VS. BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-08-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RUOFAN WANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL FELICIANO, BUILDING OPERATIONS MANAGER. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $7492.50 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 8TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,367.50 FILED BY WANG, RUOFAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-2022 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00 SERVED MAR-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,367.50 AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S AGENT FOR SERVICE FILED BY WANG, RUOFAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, RUOFAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK AND TIMBER, INC.
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT THE DEFENDANT'S AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS TO CSC - LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WANG, RUOFAN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUSNT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
